title: Model critical domain operation environment and effect

sources.reason: Defines the Critical Domain × Operation × Environment × Effect acceptance.

riskAssessment.reason: Deterministic operation classification with explicit safe fixture allowances and fail-closed production effects.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized serial remediation and the operation matrix is bounded.

preReviewWarnings: Review safe test/sandbox allowances and fail-closed production effects.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Critical domain decisions use target domain, action, environment, and effect when requestedOperation is present.
Payment, authentication, authorization, personal-data, secrets, and production-release operations distinguish safe docs/tests/sandbox from force-success, validation bypass, and production execution.
Every block includes signalId, policy reference, evidence, safe alternatives, and resume condition; legacy keyword fixtures remain fail closed.
Regression tests and Trust Layer documentation record the deterministic boundary without claiming semantic completeness.
guidelines: Keep critical-domain policy deterministic and evidence-oriented.
Do not weaken existing bypass, forgery, or production-operation guards.

intent.problem: Critical-domain guard currently blocks sensitive nouns without distinguishing harmless documentation/tests from dangerous operations and environments.
constraints: Use structured operation fields when available and retain the legacy keyword fallback.
Do not claim broad semantic risk classification.
Preserve fail-closed bypass, evidence-forgery, and production-operation behavior.
intent.rationale: A small domain × operation × environment × effect matrix reduces false positives for safe fixtures while blocking explicit dangerous effects.

rawUserRequest: Model critical domain operations by target, action, environment, and effect with safe alternatives and fail-closed evidence.

declaredIntent.summary: Distinguish safe critical-domain fixtures from dangerous effects using structured operations.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Payment sandbox mock and documentation are allowed
Payment force-success and production execution are blocked with resumable evidence
Authentication and personal-data safe tests remain distinguishable

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
